mapper.insert: INSERT INTO education (resume_id, school_name, degree, major, gpa, start_date, end_date, description, achievements, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{schoolName}, #{degree}, #{major}, #{gpa}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{description}, #{achievements}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM education WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
SELECT * FROM education WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC , end_date DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM education WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
